note: Bedrock migration anchor. No real production calibration run exists yet; Claude Sonnet 5 must pass the fixed transcript shadow comparison before paid or externally verified scoring is enabled.
escalationRule: Before paid or externally verified scoring: shadow-score the fixed anchor set against the previous GPT-5.4 outputs and human references. When calibration-run v1 freezes: (1) set PRISM_DRIFT_HARD=true in production; (2) any judge model change must shadow re-score the fixed anchor set and pass conformal recalibration; (3) only then update provider/modelId and anchorRunId in this file in the same commit. A drifted judge cannot mint credentials under the hard gate.
